100th Anniversary TUBITAK Incentive Award to Assoc. Prof. Dr. Onurcan Yılmaz

The evaluations for the 100th Anniversary TÜBİTAK Science, Special, Service and Incentive Awards, which are given by TÜBİTAK to support research and development activities in scientific and technological fields and to provide opportunities for the training and development of scientists and researchers, have been finalized.

It was decided by the TÜBİTAK Board of Directors to give 7 Science Awards, 1 Special Award, 1 Service Award and 18 Incentive Awards in 2023.

Assoc. Prof. Onurcan Yılmaz, one of the faculty members of our Department of Psychology, received the Incentive Award in the “Social Sciences and Humanities” category in the Department of Psychology.

It was announced that Dr. Yılmaz was deemed worthy of the 100th Anniversary TUBITAK Incentive Award for his “outstanding international studies in the field of psychology on the psychological antecedents and consequences of moral judgment and behavior”.

We congratulate Dr. Yılmaz and wish him continued success.
